| **PETITION:[Demand House Republicans hold a vote on the loophole that lets suspected terrorists buy guns >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7a1/e60883a/70004002/14422ff6/4225429253/VEsH/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Close-the-Loophole?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.13_B1_guns_X__F1_S5_C1__all")**

Republicans are so scared of the NRA that they're refusing to hold a vote on legislation that would prevent known and suspected terrorists from legally buying military style assault weapons in America.

A petition currently circulating in the House would force Republican leadership to bring the bill up for a vote. And we're piling on the pressure with a petition of our own.

**The choice is clear: Will Republicans side with the safety of the American people, or will they stand with terrorists and the NRA? We deserve to know.

[Add your name to demand a vote to close the terrorist gun-buying loophole:](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7a1/e60883a/70004002/14422ff6/4225429253/VEsE/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Close-the-Loophole?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.13_B1_guns_X__F1_S5_C1__all")** | ****[SIGN YOUR NAME->](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7a1/e60883a/70004002/14422ff6/4225429253/VEsF/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Close-the-Loophole?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.13_B1_guns_X__F1_S5_C1__all")****
---
Friends,

In just the last 11 years, more than 2,000 suspects on the FBI's terror watch list have legally purchased guns in the United States.

There is legislation before Congress right now that would fix this glaring loophole -- but Republicans are refusing to bring it up for a vote.

**It 's time for Republicans to put our national security ahead of the NRA. The American people deserve a vote on this issue.**

**PETITION:_[Demand that Republicans vote publicly to close the terrorist gun-buying loophole>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7a1/e60883a/70004002/14422ff6/4225429253/VEsC/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Close-the-Loophole?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.13_B1_guns_X__F1_S5_C1__all")_**

While one piece of legislation won't solve the problem of terrorism by itself, it should be blindingly obvious to every member of Congress that suspected terrorists should not have the right to buy military-style assault weapons.

Even the Bush administration proposed a bill that would have kept certain terror suspects from buying weapons of war. **This should be a no-brainer.**

**Add your name to demand that Republicans hold a public vote on closing the terrorist gun-buying loophole:**

[**http://go.boldpac.com/Close-the-Loophole**](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7a1/e60883a/70004002/14422ff6/4225429253/VEsD/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Close-the-Loophole?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.13_B1_guns_X__F1_S5_C1__all")

Thank you for standing with us,

_BOLD PAC_

|

220 I St. NE, Suite 280
Washington, DC 20002

| PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Ben Carson, Jr.
subject: What would you like to tell my dad?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32249569:s7pejdyN0:m:1:876315805:344D63D50DC964A52B7F34DB3C4BE82F:r)
---

Peter,

I've been with my dad for the past couple of days as he prepares for Tuesday night's CNN debate in Las Vegas.

Watching him work reminds me a lot of growing up, he's just wearing a different hat now.

In the Carson house, my brothers and I got used to seeing my dad working late into the night. He was responsible for making life or death decisions and no matter what it took, he was going to be prepared.

Now he has a new task at hand. Rather than preparing for surgery, he's running to lead the free world and I see that same seriousness and calm, quiet confidence that has always served him, and those around him, so well.

He knows how much trouble our country is in, and he is committed to doing everything in his power to get us headed back in the right direction.

**As he prepares, I'm working to gather as many prayers and words of encouragement from around the country as possible, because I'd like to share them with him before the debate. We've done this a few times before, and I can't tell you how much it inspires him.

**[**What would you like to say to him? You can submit your message right here.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32249569:s7pejdyN0:m:1:876315805:344D63D50DC964A52B7F34DB3C4BE82F:r)

Thank you so much for joining my family in this important endeavor. It really means a lot.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson, Jr.

name: Congressman Mick Mulvaney
subject: Join my team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Friend,

With less than two months until voting
begins, Rand has challenged me to build a team of dedicated
supporters like you who will compete in his Phone for Liberty
Bracket Challenge. My team will compete against teams put
together by my fellow Congressmen who also Stand With Rand.

Friend, I'm reaching out to you first
because I know how dedicated you have been to Rand since day one,
and I need you on my team for us to win.

Team Mulvaney will compete against the teams
of Congressmen Amash, Labrador, Lummis, and Massie in a weekly
challenge to call the most voters in critical states. Every week
for the next month, the team that makes the least number of calls
will be eliminated until we are left with a winner.

My fellow colleagues are very competitive and
want to help Rand Paul win. This is why I need your help
starting today, December 14th, to win this contest. In addition
to bragging rights at the Capitol, the team that makes the most
calls will win exclusive prizes from the campaign.

Will you sign-up for my team and begin
calling today?

It's crucial that we reach as many early
state voters as possible in the remaining weeks to the first
elections, so I'm counting on you to make a difference and lead
our team to victory!

Sign up HERE!

In Liberty,

Congressman Mulvaney

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

subject: Deal for you, Friend:
body:

I know we email you a lot asking for your help. That's because it's supporters like you who have fueled us thus far, and it's your support that will allow us to win the Republican nomination.

However, as an early Christmas present, I wanted to give you a chance to save yourself some email traffic later this month.

We have our final deadline of 2015 at the end of the year, and my team and I are preparing a big fundraising drive for the final few days.

[**But, Friend, if you chip in $25 or more right now, we will make sure you don't receive any of these fundraising emails for the rest of the year!**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wfgqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhvljng_cljccqmh.html)

Jeb

Friend,

Less than 24 hours remain until the 5th GOP presidential debate, and Senator Graham is busy preparing for what will certainly be a memorable night.

name: Rand Paul
subject: Important: About Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot, With just over six weeks until the Iowa Caucuses, I can hardly explain just how important Tuesday night's debate is. **With many Americans preparing for the holidays, it's the last taste many voters will take of politics until the New Year.** Patriot, the great news is, I WILL be on the main stage Tuesday night to share our message and prove once again that I'm the only conservative in this race. [I've also released a new ad that contrasts the important differences between me and my opponents](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32261414:WKEIcdyNw:m:1:879035888:CBF7A88210C2971B96A3472314A479E3:r). We're gaining momentum and we're not stopping. [But I'm counting on your generous support to help ensure we send a message to the media and the Big Government establishment of BOTH parties that you and I are not going away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32261415:WKEIcdyNw:m:1:879035888:CBF7A88210C2971B96A3472314A479E3:r). **After my strong performance in last month's debate, I know there are many who want to destroy my message of liberty.** **It's not working.** Brand new polls have me squarely in the middle of the pack both in Iowa and nationally. We are organized in all 50 states. We have 400 fully operational grassroots groups and my campaign and related entities have raised over $22 million! Not only that, but since the last GOP debate, we've seen attacks in Paris. We've seen the tragedy in San Bernardino, California. Yet, we've seen no leadership out of this White House, and nothing but the same old failed ideas coming from many members of my own Republican Party It's clear, Patriot, [like I say in my ad](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32261414:WKEIcdyNw:m:1:879035888:CBF7A88210C2971B96A3472314A479E3:r). . . we need leaders who learn from our past mistakes. **A new direction centered on individual liberty and constitutionally limited government that actually keeps us safe.** I'm counting on you to stand with me by making your most generous contribution. [Please make your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or $10 right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32261416:WKEIcdyNw:m:1:879035888:CBF7A88210C2971B96A3472314A479E3:r) In Liberty, Rand Paul | | [GIVE $50 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32261416:WKEIcdyNw:m:1:879035888:CBF7A88210C2971B96A3472314A479E3:r)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I want you to read this note from a supporter
body:
#
Brothers and Sisters -
I want you to read a note that our campaign received from a supporter just a few months ago.
> _"I've never donated to a political campaign, or even considered it really. When I saw how much small donations make a difference, and started to learn more about Bernie, I got choked up. I'm hoping that my small contribution will help make this world a better place. I trust you Bernie!" - Amanda from Nevada_
**Here's something the corporate media won't tell you** : because of people like you and Amanda, our campaign has more grassroots support than any Republican or Democratic campaign in this election. The size of our crowds, the number of volunteers and the historic nature of the way we've funded this campaign is something I am very proud of.
With just two weeks before the final FEC fundraising deadline of the year, we've set a goal that will shock the political elite and billionaire class of this country: **reaching our two millionth individual contribution by Wednesday at midnight.**
**[Make a $3 contribution to our campaign today to help us reach two million individual, small-dollar contributions by Wednesday at midnight.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb296c/43f17890/4c9d2c91/62166598/3821679232/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-get-2-million?refcode=em151214-2a-stand-together-and-we-win")**
This campaign isn't about Bernie Sanders or Hillary Clinton and it might shock the political media to know it's not even about Donald Trump. This campaign is about families like yours who are desperate for a political revolution in this country. Let us never forget that this country belongs to all of us, and not just a handful of billionaires.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb296c/43f17890/4c9d2c91/62166598/3821679232/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-get-2-million?refcode=em151214-2a-stand-together-and-we-win")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb296c/43f17890/4c9d2c91/62166599/3821679232/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb296c/43f17890/4c9d2c91/62166586/3821679232/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb296c/43f17890/4c9d2c91/62166587/3821679232/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb296c/43f17890/4c9d2c91/62166584/3821679232/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

subject: Irish Soda Bread and Resolutions
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---

Friend --

My family has a few traditions that come with the close of each year: Opening our presents at midnight, competing for the best homemade Irish soda bread, and making resolutions for the upcoming year.

Here's my biggest resolution for 2016: **Building a grassroots campaign that can take on Republican Senator Pat Toomey and win.**

In order to make that happen though, I need your help, and right now, that means meeting some ambitious fundraising goals.

Our campaign has set a fundraising goal for December that will give us the competitive edge we need and ensure we don't fall short before the new year. **To stay on track, my team is telling me we need 85 new online donors to step up before midnight tomorrow.**

**[Make your first donation to my campaign today by chipping in $5 to help us hit our early 2015 deadline. Every dollar and every donor makes a difference.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8362852348141240320/-804716067694837760?refcode=e20151214&refcode2=e20151214nd&amount=5)**

The strongest grassroots campaign is built one person at a time. It's made by you and your neighbors chipping in $5 here and $15 there, and I'm so grateful for the support I've been receiving from grassroots donors here in Pennsylvania and across the country. But the fact is that we can't afford to come up short of a single fundraising goal. **If we fall behind in these critical early months, we won 't be able to build the kind of strong campaign we need to take on Pat Toomey and win in 2016.**

Our end-of-year goal is big and aggressive, and I'm counting on your early support to ensure we hit it.

**[Help my campaign get an early start on our end-of-year grassroots goal: Chip in $5 or whatever you can right now and help us meet our early deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8362852348141240320/-804716067694837760?refcode=e20151214&refcode2=e20151214nd&amount=5)**

Katie

body:
| "Every time Donald Trump opens his mouth, he helps ISIS recruit more terrorists...They are waiting for extreme comments like this to come out of quote-unquote leaders." \- Patrick Murphy Friends,

By now, you've probably heard Trump's latest anti-Muslim rant. He absurdly called for a "total and complete shutdown of Muslims entering the United States."

Not only is his rhetoric deeply un-American, it's actually dangerous. _Donald Trump 's speech is exactly the kind of propaganda fodder extremist groups like ISIS seek out to recruit new members and incite violence._ They feed off the false perception that Muslims are hated by the West.

**Patrick called Trump out on it.** He understands that Trump's comments don't make us any safer; instead they project a distorted version of America to the Muslim world.

[**Join Patrick and demand that Donald Trump stop spewing his hate and contributing to ISIS 's propaganda machine.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae219a/738133e4/3bfe5c62/7f8374a3/2222541973/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151214")

We are a country of inclusiveness and religious freedom, not of hate. It's time for Republicans to collectively denounce Trump's bigotry. **Some members of the GOP already have, but Patrick 's opponents for Senate leave something to be desired.**

For example, Rep. Ron DeSantis refrained from commenting on Trump's latest speech, and Rep. David Jolly couldn't seem to make up his mind. After criticizing Trump on the House floor, Jolly sent out an email to his supporters with the subject line "Donald Trump and I agree."

This isn't a time for silence or contradiction. **We cannot accept Trump 's hate-mongering, and we cannot accept leaders who tolerate it.**

[**Stand with Patrick in telling Donald Trump we won 't stand for his anti-muslim language. It puts us in danger.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae219a/738133e4/3bfe5c62/7f8374a3/2222541973/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151214")

Thank you,

| **Sign your name:[Stand with President Obama to demand immediate action to END gun violence >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ba/e60883a/70072afc/14422dab/1315893694/VEsH/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Demand-Action?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.14_B1_potus-guns_X__F1_S4_C1__all")**

Three years ago [today](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ba/e60883a/70072afc/14422dab/1315893694/VEsE/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Demand-Action?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.14_B1_potus-guns_X__F1_S4_C1__all"), this country witnessed a terrible tragedy at an elementary school in Newtown, Connecticut.

Nearly every day, Americans are killed by guns -- in schools and movie theaters, in churches and doctors' offices. But despite the continual violence and tragedy, our leaders in Congress remain silent.

**[_We 've had enough._ Add your name to stand with President Obama and demand IMMEDIATE action on gun violence >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ba/e60883a/70072afc/14422dab/1315893694/VEsF/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Demand-Action?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.14_B1_potus-guns_X__F1_S4_C1__all")** | ****[SIGN IMMEDIATELY>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ba/e60883a/70072afc/14422dab/1315893694/VEsC/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Demand-Action?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.14_B1_potus-guns_X__F1_S4_C1__all")****
---
Friends --

Since that tragic day three years ago, nearly 90,000 more people have been killed by guns in America.

**This status quo is NOT acceptable.** It should be clear to every American, especially those in public office, that we have a responsibility to end routine gun violence and to keep guns out of the hands of people who shouldn't have them.
[](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea7ba/e60883a/70072afc/14422dab/1315893694/VEsD/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Demand-Action?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.14_B1_potus-guns_X__F1_S4_C1__all")

Despite the mounting number of gun deaths since Sandy Hook, the NRA hasn't lost its control over the people we send to Washington to keep our families safe. They've even gotten Congress to pass a bill that prohibits the federal government from _studying_ the issue of gun violence.

Listen, we cannot allow the NRA and the cowardice of Republicans to stand in way of keeping America safe. **The stakes are too high.**

| **House GOP blocks Dem effort to force vote on banning terror suspects from buying guns**
\-- _USA Today_ , 12/10/2015 Friends,

Republicans in the House had every opportunity to do the right thing. They had the chance to stop those on the Terrorist Watchlist from walking into a store and buying a gun.

But, like Patrick said, Republicans are **" more scared of the NRA and the upcoming elections than they are of terrorists."**

It's clear these tragedies won't make politicians stand up to the NRA. It's going to take huge pressure from the grassroots to get this done.

_So we 're going to give it to them._

[**Tell Republicans in the House: Forget the NRA. Stop those on the Terrorist Watchlist from purchasing guns NOW.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2198/738133e4/3bfc7a4e/7f837563/1458693166/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151216d")

**In the past decade, more than 2,000 terror suspects have legally purchased guns in this country.** These are people that are believed to be so dangerous they are forbidden to board airplanes. But the NRA so staunchly opposes ANY restrictions on gun ownership that Republicans fell in step and essentially continued to allow suspected terrorists to purchase deadly weapons.

The Senate initially tried to close the terrorist gun loophole, but it failed because of the Republican majority. We can't think of a better reason to elect Patrick and make sure Democrats regain majority control in 2016.

We need lawmakers in Congress who will take a common-sense approach to gun safety, not act as proxies for the NRA.

[**Until then, add your name and demand that Republicans stop being afraid of the gun lobby, and start worrying about our well-being.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2198/738133e4/3bfc7a4e/7f837563/1458693166/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151216d")
